steps.t: Sacks of flour and vegetables can be found within the Eaworth Vendor Hall. Offram wants you to collect sacks of flour and vegetables to finish making …
Ordbéorth's oven can be found behind his house in the northern part of Eaworth. Offram wants you to take the meat, flour, and vegetables to Ordbéorth'…
People in need of provisions can be found throughout Eaworth. Offram wants you to take the meat-pies you baked to people in need of provisions for the…
Offram stands guard outside the Vendor Hall in Eaworth. You should return to Offram and let him know that you have delivered the meat-pies.
